title: 2021 SNC Trust Heritage Distribution
summary: SNC Trust Declares Largest Shareholder Distribution in its History Nome, Alaska | November 5, 2021 The Trustees of the SNC Trust are pleased to declare a Heritage Distribution of $9.50 per Trust Unit (or $950.00 for those with 100 Trust Units) to all beneficiaries of record as of November 4, 2021.
